name: The Data Analyst
effect: Transform raw data into actionable insights on request. This card is considered indispensable.

clauses.name: CLEANING CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Before any insight is produced: Seventy percent of available time is consumed.

clauses.name: REFRAME EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the insight contradicts the stakeholder's assumption: The request is resubmitted with revised parameters.

clauses.name: SINGLE SOURCE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no authoritative data source exists: The analyst is considered the authoritative data source.

witness_quote: Can you just pull a quick number?

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Which version of this report is current?
